title: Apps
heading: Apps & Games
intro: Explore BarkinMad Studios apps, retro-inspired arcade games, mobile software, and digital tools for iPhone and iPad.

hero.alt: BarkinMad Studios games, mobile applications and software projects

description: Browse the growing BarkinMad Studios portfolio, including the ZX Series of connected retro arcade games, standalone mobile apps, productivity tools, and future software projects.

content.heading: Mobile Apps, Games & Digital Products
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios develops mobile apps, retro-inspired arcade games, productivity tools, prototypes, and software products designed for iPhone and iPad.
Our goal is to create software that is easy to use, enjoyable to interact with, and built with long-term support and maintainability in mind.
The portfolio includes both entertainment-focused experiences and practical applications, combining modern mobile technology with a strong focus on usability and performance.

content.heading: The ZX Series
paragraphs: The [ZX Series](/zx-series) is the flagship collection of retro-inspired arcade games from BarkinMad Studios.

Games within the series can share achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, multiplayer systems, progression features, and future cross-game rewards, creating a connected arcade ecosystem across multiple titles.
Current and planned games include [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake), [ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick), [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), [ZXPong](/apps/zxpong), and additional future releases.

content.heading: Beyond Gaming
paragraphs: In addition to games, BarkinMad Studios develops practical mobile applications and software solutions including score tracking tools, business utilities, prototypes, and future productivity-focused products.
Many of the skills and technologies used to build commercial software and business systems also help shape the architecture, reliability, and user experience of our public applications.
Learn more about our [software development services](/services), custom applications, and business solutions.

sections.title: ZX Series
sections.description: Explore the connected ZX Series of retro-inspired arcade games featuring achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, multiplayer modes, shared progression systems, and future roadmap features.

sections.title: Apps & Tools
